mapper.sql: SELECT c.contact_id, c.customer_id, c.name, c.gender, c.position, c.department, c.role_tag, c.phone, c.email, c.wechat, c.qq, c.is_key, c.is_primary, c.owner_user_id, c.last_contact_time, c.next_contact_time, c.personal_trait, c.del_flag, c.create_by, c.create_time, c.update_by, c.update_time, c.remark, cu.customer_name, u.nick_name as owner_user_name FROM mk_contact c LEFT JOIN mk_customer cu ON c.customer_id = cu.customer_id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON c.owner_user_id = u.user_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mk_contact (customer_id, name, gender, position, department, role_tag, phone, email, wechat, qq, is_key, is_primary, owner_user_id, last_contact_time, next_contact_time, personal_trait, create_by, create_time, remark) VALUES (#{customerId}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{position}, #{department}, #{roleTag}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{wechat}, #{qq}, #{isKey}, #{isPrimary}, #{ownerUserId}, #{lastContactTime}, #{nextContactTime}, #{personalTrait}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.delete: UPDATE mk_contact SET del_flag = '2' WHERE contact_id IN #{contactId}
mapper.select: WHERE c.del_flag = '0' AND c.customer_id = #{customerId} ORDER BY c.name
mapper.update: UPDATE mk_interaction SET contact_id = #{masterId} WHERE contact_id = #{slaveId}
UPDATE mk_activity_participant SET contact_id = #{masterId} WHERE contact_id = #{slaveId}
UPDATE mk_contact SET is_primary = '0' WHERE customer_id = #{customerId} AND contact_id != #{contactId}
UPDATE mk_contact SET owner_user_id = #{ownerUserId}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() WHERE contact_id = #{contactId}
mapper.select: WHERE c.del_flag = '0' AND c.next_contact_time IS NOT NULL AND c.next_contact_time <= DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND c.owner_user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY c.next_contact_time ASC LIMIT 20
